authors: Salla Tuomola Jaana Hujanen Katja Lehtisaari Juho Ruotsalainen Mikko Grönlund
raw_title: At the Crossroads of Fear, Confusion and Hope. COVID-19 News as the Motivator of Affective News Usage and Sense-Making Practices
title_en: At the Crossroads of Fear, Confusion and Hope. COVID-19 News as the Motivator of Affective News Usage and Sense-Making Practices
title_zh: 恐惧、困惑与希望的十字路口：COVID-19新闻作为情感新闻使用与意义建构实践的驱动因素
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了人们在疫情期间如何通过新闻来应对恐惧、困惑和希望等复杂情感，以及这些情感如何影响他们使用新闻和理解世界的方式。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how people use news to navigate complex emotions like fear, confusion, and hope during the pandemic, and how these emotions shape their news consumption and understanding of the world.
research_direction_zh: 探索情感在危机时期新闻消费中的作用，以及新闻如何帮助人们应对不确定性和构建意义。
research_direction_en: Investigating the role of emotions in news consumption during crises, and how news helps people cope with uncertainty and construct meaning.
